name: Kegan Anderson
headline: Business Analyst | Data and Reporting
summary: Business Analyst with experience supporting data-driven operations, reporting, and system workflows. Skilled in Excel analysis, data validation, and CRM data management. Proven ability to improve data accuracy, streamline processes, and deliver reporting insights that support business decision making.

experience.title: Data Analyst
highlights: Analyzed and maintained operational datasets within CRM systems to support reporting on performance trends and business metrics
Developed reporting processes to track compliance and operational trends, improving visibility and decision making
Improved data accuracy and reduced report rejections through data validation and process improvements
Identified and resolved data discrepancies, ensuring integrity across reporting systems and supporting business operations
Coordinated with international teams to validate and standardize jurisdictional data, improving reporting consistency
Led a remote data collection initiative using mapping tools to improve system tracking and operational visibility

experience.title: Business Analyst | Data and Reporting
highlights: Managed inventory tracking and reporting, improving accuracy and reducing waste
Improved operational processes to increase efficiency and consistency across daily workflows
Built reporting processes to track compliance and operational trends, improving visibility and decision making
Standardized datasets within CRM systems to improve reporting accuracy and consistency
